---
title: "STATS19 Stats"
---

These pages show the outputs of the functions/markdown scripts in stats19_stats, which build on the import functions in the stats19 R package.

The goal of this repository/website is to facilitate people to easily reproduce the DfTs statistical summaries for their local area and/or additional plots and insights to provide data for campaigns where road safety is significant.

The first page is the outputs of the script 'report.R', a report that can be reproduced for any LA, shown here for Bristol.

The 'DfT Pedestrian factsheet' is a reproduction of the government pedestrian factsheet. The file in the Rmd folder "dft_pedestrian_factsheet.qmd" gives the code to reproduce the plots used in the [official DfT report](https://www.gov.uk/government/statistics/reported-road-casualties-great-britain-pedestrian-factsheet-2024/reported-road-casualties-in-great-britain-pedestrian-factsheet-2024).
